## Summary of Analysis
For our analysis we compared 3 different variables: Effectiveness, Difficulty and Understanding. We examined  the ratings students gave for all 3 variables, in which 1 was low and 7 was high, whether that is high difficulty or high effectiveness. To further udnerstand our data, we did deeper analysis in which we directly compared two variables: Effectiveness vs Understanding and Effectiveness vs Difficulty.


## The plots below visualize the data we obtained and chose to report on. There are 5 total plots showcasing the 3 possible variables.

## Our Project Analysis Conclusions
Our analysis was supported by our data as we got the highest number of responses, specially about 160 and 140 student responses, for helpfulness rating of 6 and 7. This datat shows us that most students said that the practice questiosnw ere effective in aiding them in quiz preperation for the actual quizzes.
To further refine our data, we can more specifically ask students what aspects of the practice quizzes helped them the most such as, the formatting of the mcq or the amount of mcq versus code writing questions. The trade off that arises however is that studeents might become too accustomed to the formatting of the practice quizzes/questions. This would make it so that if the formatting of the true quizzes changes, student could be caught off guard and therefore struggle on the quiz.
